ksa_text: Design and document the enterprise ML platform architecture, including training infrastructure, feature store design, model registry, serving layer, and monitoring stack.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-011 (AI and Machine Learning/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.427, highest: DDaT at 0.427). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. ISO 8000 data administration: data quality process execution under ISO standards, data records management, quality control procedures, and compliance documentation.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.427, and AI and Machine Learning (AI) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.427)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of ISO 8000 Data Administrator job postings does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
